warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (Second Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 50-60 kmph with wave height up to 4.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket until Wednesday, 8 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Kedua)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 50-60 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 4.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket sehingga Rabu, 8 Julai 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Perlis & Kedah, Penang, Perak, Selangor, N. Sembilan, Melaka, Johor, Pahang, Terengganu, Sarawak and Western Sabah and Labuan, Eastern Sabah until 10:00AM; Friday, 3 July 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Perlis & Kedah, Pulau Pinang, Perak, Selangor, N. Sembilan, Melaka, Johor, Pahang, Terengganu, Sarawak dan Sabah Barat dan Labuan, Sabah Timur sehingga 10:00 pagi; Jumaat, 3 Julai 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Phuket, Straits of Melaka, Samui, Tioman, Condore, northwestern part of Bunguran, Reef North, Reef South, Layang-Layang, Labuan, Palawan, Sulu and Sulawesi until 10:00AM; Friday, 3 July 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket, Selat Melaka, Samui, Tioman, Condore, barat laut Bunguran, Reef North, Reef South, Layang-Layang, Labuan, Palawan, Sulu dan Sulawesi sehingga 10:00 pagi; Jumaat, 3 Julai 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Northern Straits of Melaka, northeastern part of Condore, northern part of Reef North and Palawan until Wednesday, 8 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Selat Melaka Utara, timur laut Condore, utara Reef North dan Palawan sehingga Rabu, 8 Julai 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Perlis ;  Kedah  (Langkawi, Kubang Pasu, Kota Setar, Pokok Sena, Padang Terap, Yan, Pendang, Kuala Muda, Sik and Baling);  Perak  (Manjung, Perak Tengah, Bagan Datuk and Hilir Perak);  Selangor ;  FT Kuala Lumpur ;  FT Putrajaya ;  Negeri Sembilan ;  Melaka ; and  Sarawak:  Sri Aman, Betong (Betong), Sarikei (Pakan, Julau and Meradong), Sibu (Sibu and Kanowit) and Kapit (Song) until 9:00AM; Friday, 3 July 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Perlis ;  Kedah  (Langkawi, Kubang Pasu, Kota Setar, Pokok Sena, Padang Terap, Yan, Pendang, Kuala Muda, Sik dan Baling);  Perak  (Manjung, Perak Tengah, Bagan Datuk dan Hilir Perak);  Selangor ;  WP Kuala Lumpur ;  WP Putrajaya ;  Negeri Sembilan ;  Melaka ; dan  Sarawak:  Sri Aman, Betong (Betong), Sarikei (Pakan, Julau dan Meradong), Sibu (Sibu dan Kanowit) dan Kapit (Song) sehingga 9:00 pagi; Jumaat, 3 Julai 2026.

data.text_en: Category:  Tropical Storm Advisory (MAYSAK)                  Time of Observation:  05:00, 03 July 2026                  Location:  Latitude 17.5 North and Longitude 108.9 East                  Movement:  West-Northwest 5 km/h.                  Maximum wind speed:  65 km/h                  Distance from nearest international city:  approximately 110 km Northeast of Sanya, China.                  Distance from nearest Malaysian city:  Approximately 1451 km Northeast of Bachok, Kelantan                  Threat to Malaysia:  No significant impact.
data.text_bm: Kategori:  Nasihat Ribut Tropika (MAYSAK)                  Masa Pencerapan:  05:00, 03 Julai 2026                  Kedudukan:  Latitud 17.5 Utara dan Longitud 108.9 Timur                  Pergerakan:  Ke arah Barat Barat Laut dengan kelajuan 5 km/j.                  Kelajuan angin maksimum:  65 km/j                  Jarak dari bandar antarabangsa terdekat:  kira-kira 110 km ke Timur Laut Sanya, China.                  Jarak dari bandar terdekat:  Kira-kira 1451 km ke Timur Laut Bachok, Kelantan                  Kesan terhadap Malaysia:  Tiada kesan signifikan.
